channel.title: Home on Daytona Driggers
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Daytona Driggers

item.title: About
item.description: My name is Daytona. You may see me online as daytona, working on applications, blogs, videos, and building systems that help people live a life that is fulfilling - not robotic. My sincerest hope is to make life better, not annoying.
